title: Are plant-based diets appropriate for children and pregnancy? With Ex-Vegan Jon Venus

chunks.title: Hair Growth Supplement Review
chunks.summary: The video opens with a review of a hair growth supplement that helped the speaker's friend, April, regrow her hair after experiencing loss during the pandemic. The supplement is enriched with special types of collagen known to enhance hair growth and wound healing.
chunks.transcript: abundant hair growth check out this review on skin hair and nails from heart and soil supplements by april g i love this product my hair is growing in fast and abundantly i lost 60 of my hair during you know i tried other brands this one works within weeks of starting it thank you so much though it is strange to have that sort of a hair loss from a virus like what happened during the pandemic it's awesome to hear that april's hair is regrowing with skin hair and nails from heart and soil supplements that has liver bone marrow and trachea and scapular cartilage those are special types of collagen that were studied by a physician named john pruden a surgeon and had increased efficacy for wound healing and hair growth in his studies so those special types of collagen are what we put in skin hair and nails from heart and soil supplements works for both men and women good hair good skin good nails all the biotin and liver check us out at

chunks.title: John Venus's Transition from Veganism
chunks.summary: John Venus discusses his transition from being a vegan to adopting an animal-based diet. He shares his challenges with health issues that arose during his vegan years and emphasizes the differences in health outcomes for his children based on their diets.
chunks.transcript: is to help you reclaim your birthright to optimal radical health this week i had john venus on the podcast john was on a couple of years ago right when he transitioned from being a very well-known vegan proponent to eating meat in the two years since then he's eaten a lot more meat he actually did a six-month experiment where he went back to being plant-based as he talked about in this podcast that caused a recurrence of all of his symptoms muscle cramping joint pains etc recently he's been eating a lot of meat on the order of what i eat and fruit is interesting he's getting some organs too he's basically eating an animal-based diet we talk about his experiences what he observed in the vegan community the hate that he's gotten from the vegan community vegans are pretty carnivorous when it comes to it actually guys and we talk about his kids and what he observed in vegan kids he has one child who was born when both he and his wife were vegan and one child his daughter who was born when neither of them were vegan they have different health outcomes and different growth anecdotal but quite interesting we go through a lot of science in this one and we talk about why a plant-based diet is no way shape or form an optimal diet for humans in any stage of our lives so enjoy this podcast with

chunks.title: The Vegan Community's Reaction
chunks.summary: The conversation touches on the backlash received from the vegan community after John shared his experiences transitioning from veganism. The discussion highlights the intense reactions, including hate and threats, from a community that claims to advocate for compassion.

chunks.title: Experiences with Children on Vegan Diets
chunks.summary: John shares anecdotes from the vegan community regarding the health outcomes of children raised on vegan diets. He contrasts the health experiences of his son, who was raised vegan, with his daughter, who has not been exposed to veganism.

chunks.title: Nutritional Deficiencies in Vegan Children
chunks.summary: The video discusses the potential nutritional deficiencies observed in children raised on vegan diets, including issues related to growth and health outcomes. John expresses concern over the long-term impact of such diets on children's development.

chunks.title: Discussion on Vegan Diet Research
chunks.summary: The duo critiques various studies advocating vegan diets, pointing out the lack of evidence related to micronutrients and long-term health outcomes. They emphasize the importance of incorporating animal products for optimal child health.

chunks.title: The Role of Supplements in Vegan Diets
chunks.summary: The discussion shifts to the heavy reliance on supplements in vegan diets to meet nutritional needs, questioning the naturalness and healthfulness of such approaches for children.

chunks.title: Choline and Its Importance
chunks.summary: The video explores the topic of choline, an essential nutrient often lacking in vegan diets. The speakers discuss its role in child development and the challenges vegan diets pose in sourcing choline efficiently.
chunks.transcript: um and i also started noticing many many things that were kind of going against my beliefs that the vegan diet was optimal for human beings and optimal for all stages of life i was witnessing too many things that were kind of contradicting my belief and so i started questioning things more and more and especially after becoming a father i wanted to take that extra step and make sure that i was doing the right thing for my son and so i started um you know reaching out to vegan doctors because i couldn't personally find any evidence and studies and peer-reviewed research that would satisfy the questions that i had and so you know once i got uh you know the answers from these vegan md's nutritionist phds uh of which i had access to all of them because i was very well known within the

chunks.title: Final Thoughts on Vegan Diets for Children
chunks.summary: The final segment highlights the consensus that an animal-based diet provides essential nutrients for children and that vegan diets may not meet all necessary developmental needs. John stresses the importance of being open to evidence and personal experiences.
